description_long: This bollard is designed as a tall, rectangular stone pedestal supporting a classical-style bust of a man. The pedestal features engraved text and a crest on its front and rear faces, adding a formal and commemorative appearance. The bust is detailed, with curly hair and draped clothing, and is integrated seamlessly atop the pedestal. The entire structure rests on a square stone base, which provides stability and a sense of permanence. The surface of the bollard is weathered, with visible discoloration and patina, suggesting it is made of stone or concrete and intended for outdoor use. Its imposing height and decorative features make it suitable for placement in parks, plazas, or near historical landmarks.
description: A tall, rectangular stone bollard with a classical bust on top, engraved text, and a square base, showing weathered and decorative features.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the back of the bust, the crest engraved on the pedestal, and the square base.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the bust and the elongated, unadorned side of the pedestal.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the detailed bust, engraved text, and the main face of the pedestal.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the bust's profile and the plain side of the pedestal.
